candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line matching cash and cash equivalents.
Cash-related line, but less comprehensive than the standard cash and cash equivalents total.

variables.notes: Preferred the standard total cash line on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean balance-sheet total for current financing debt; excludes leases and is preferable to combining components.
Represents current portion of long-term debt, but likely a component of current interest-bearing liabilities rather than the full total.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a label outside the STD shortlist because it is a cleaner reported total for short-term interest-bearing debt. Excluded lease-related rows and avoided double counting with 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year'.

candidates.why: Exact match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Exact total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; best match for PPEGT.
PPE-related but only a component, not the total.

variables.notes: Preferred the total net PPE line over component rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash flow from operating activities line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
